title: Project DB, Stable Object Graph, And Test Foundation
description: Create the Rust workspace foundation, project lifecycle CLI skeleton, SQLite migrations, stable ObjectRef/object key model, analysis_runs records, and deterministic fixture/test harness.
convergence_criteria: rg "struct ObjectRef|enum ObjectKind" crates/revdeck-core; rg "analysis_runs" crates/revdeck-db; rg "CREATE TABLE objects|CREATE TABLE edges" crates/revdeck-db; rg "schema_migrations" crates/revdeck-db; cargo test --workspace
hints: Read RevDeck.txt, TASK-001.json, E1/E2/E4 analysis. Keep implementation to foundation only; do not implement later indexing/TUI behavior beyond skeleton crates.
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-core object_ref; cargo test -p revdeck-core stable_object_key; cargo test -p revdeck-db migrations; cargo test -p revdeck-db project_reopen; cargo test -p revdeck-db analysis_runs; cargo test --workspace
findings: Completed Rust workspace foundation with ObjectRef/stable keys, analysis_runs, SQLite object graph migrations/repositories, CLI skeleton, fixtures, and foundation tests.
tests_passed: Passed independent rg convergence checks and cargo test --workspace.

title: Native Binary Ingest And Deterministic Indexing
description: Implement the v0.1 binary ingest path for deterministic ELF fixtures, including artifact registration, sections, symbols, imports, strings, function candidates, xref/call edges, structured diagnostics, and boundary_confidence.
convergence_criteria: rg "boundary_confidence" crates/revdeck-core crates/revdeck-index crates/revdeck-db; rg "CALLS_IMPORT|XREF_FROM|REFERENCES|DERIVED_FROM" crates; rg "source-controlled|sha256|expected" fixtures/manifest.json tests; cargo test -p revdeck-index; revdeck import on corrupt fixture returns structured failure and records failed analysis_run
hints: Read TASK-002.json, E1/E2/E4 analyses, and TASK-001 summary. Extend existing foundation without breaking stable ObjectRef and migrations. Keep Graph/Radar/TUI/export out of scope.
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-index fixture_minimal_elf; cargo test -p revdeck-index fixture_stripped_elf; cargo test -p revdeck-index fixture_sensitive_imports; cargo test -p revdeck-index corrupt_artifact_records_failed_run; cargo test -p revdeck-db reindex_idempotent_indexed_facts; cargo test --workspace
findings: Implemented native ELF ingest with artifact registration, sections/symbols/imports/strings/functions/xrefs/edges, boundary_confidence, structured diagnostics, idempotent indexed facts, and CLI import wiring.
tests_passed: Passed independent rg convergence checks, cargo test -p revdeck-index, cargo test -p revdeck-db object_relation_queries, and cargo test --workspace.

title: Object Graph Query, Universal Navigation, And Command Pipeline
description: Build the shared ObjectRef query service, local object graph traversal, navigation history, and command parser/resolver/executor separation used by TUI, memory, findings, and export workflows.
convergence_criteria: rg "CommandParser|CommandResolver|CommandExecutor" crates/revdeck-core; rg "navigate_to\\(|back\\(|forward\\(" crates/revdeck-core tests; rg "Ambiguous|Unresolved|UnsupportedInV01|BrokenObject" crates/revdeck-core; cargo test -p revdeck-core command_; integration tests cover String -> Xref -> Function -> Import -> Back
hints: Read TASK-003.json, E1/E3/E4 analyses, and current code after TASK-002 if present. Use ObjectRef APIs, keep parser/resolver/executor separate, and avoid broad query language.
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-core command_parser; cargo test -p revdeck-core command_resolver; cargo test -p revdeck-core command_executor_no_mutation_on_error; cargo test -p revdeck-core navigation_history; cargo test -p revdeck-db object_relation_queries; cargo test --workspace
findings: Implemented ObjectRef query service, SQLite relation queries, bounded traversal, navigation history, and parser/resolver/executor command pipeline with mutation-safety tests.
tests_passed: Passed independent rg convergence checks, cargo test -p revdeck-core command_, navigation/command integration tests, and cargo test --workspace.

title: Function Radar Structured Scoring And Triage View Models
description: Implement deterministic Function Radar scoring, structured reason records linked to evidence ObjectRefs, boundary_confidence visibility, stable sort/filter behavior, and reusable Overview/Radar/Inspector view models.
convergence_criteria: rg "ScoreReason|reason_code|evidence_refs|contribution" crates; rg "boundary_confidence" crates/revdeck-core/src/radar crates/revdeck-core/src/view_models; rg "dangerous|sensitive|entrypoint|tag" crates/revdeck-core/src/radar; fixture tests assert score ordering and reasons
hints: Read TASK-004.json, E2/E3/E4 analyses, TASK-002/TASK-003 summaries. Do not implement Analysis Memory persistence or TUI rendering beyond view models.
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-core radar_signal_dangerous_imports; cargo test -p revdeck-core radar_signal_sensitive_strings; cargo test -p revdeck-core radar_reason_object_refs; cargo test -p revdeck-core radar_stable_sort; cargo test -p revdeck-index scoring_analyzer_run; cargo test --workspace
findings: Implemented deterministic Function Radar scoring, structured ScoreReason evidence, persisted score_reasons, analyzer-run integration, and reusable Overview/Radar/Inspector view models.
tests_passed: Passed required radar tests, rg convergence checks, cargo test -p revdeck-index scoring_analyzer_run, and cargo test --workspace.

title: Analysis Memory, Findings Evidence, And Markdown/JSON Export
description: Implement analyst-owned annotations, tags, renames, statuses, TODOs, hypotheses, structured findings with evidence links, pre-export validation, and deterministic Markdown/JSON reports that survive re-indexing.
convergence_criteria: rg "Note|Tag|Rename|Status|Todo|Hypothesis" crates/revdeck-core/src/memory crates/revdeck-db; rg "finding_evidence|EvidenceRef|pre_export" crates; rg "Markdown|Json|Export" crates/revdeck-core/src/export crates/revdeck-cli; tests prove re-index preserves memory and evidence links
hints: Read TASK-005.json, E1/E3/E4 analyses, TASK-002/TASK-003 summaries. Keep Ratatui UI rendering for TASK-006.
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-core memory_annotations; cargo test -p revdeck-db reindex_preserves_analysis_memory; cargo test -p revdeck-core findings_evidence; cargo test -p revdeck-core export_json_round_trip; cargo test -p revdeck-core export_markdown_golden; cargo test --workspace
findings: Implemented analyst-owned annotations, evidence-linked findings, pre-export validation, and deterministic Markdown/JSON export; corrected prior worker timeout after independent verification.
tests_passed: Passed memory/findings/export tests, cargo test -p revdeck-memory-tests, cargo test -p revdeck-export-tests, and cargo test --workspace.

title: Three-Pane Ratatui Workspace Integration
description: Deliver the v0.1 TUI workspace: left navigation, main lens, right inspector, bottom command bar, reducer-driven state, local object jumps, Function Radar, analysis memory, findings, export feedback, and terminal-size fallbacks.
convergence_criteria: rg "ratatui|crossterm" crates/revdeck-tui Cargo.toml; rg "Workspace|Main View|Inspector|Command" crates/revdeck-tui; rg "Overview|Binary Map|Function Radar|Strings|Imports|Notes|Findings" crates/revdeck-tui; rg "TestBackend|reducer" crates/revdeck-tui tests/tui; fixture project can navigate Radar -> evidence -> note/tag -> finding -> export status without render-time DB mutation
hints: Read TASK-003/TASK-004/TASK-005 outputs. TUI consumes view models and CommandState/NavigationHistory; no direct DB access inside render functions.
execution_directives: cargo test -p revdeck-tui reducer_navigation; cargo test -p revdeck-tui reducer_command_results; cargo test -p revdeck-tui render_workspace_three_pane; cargo test -p revdeck-tui render_small_terminal_fallback; cargo test -p revdeck-tui function_radar_inspector_snapshot; cargo test --workspace
findings: Implemented Ratatui/Crossterm three-pane workspace, reducer state, pure snapshot rendering, Function Radar, Inspector, command bar, analysis memory/findings/export feedback, CLI tui wiring, tests/tui, and small terminal fallback.
tests_passed: Passed all TASK-006 targeted tests, cargo test -p revdeck-tui-tests, cargo fmt --all -- --check, cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings, and cargo test --workspace.
